narrative:
South-Euclid municipal court district has 15,743 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 43.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 37.5 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +14.0% D−R vs +49.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
